finding: Cryptographic JWT verification and exact GitHub Actions claim authorization must be composed into one fail-closed decision; neither layer may upgrade failure in the other.

verification.method: isolated Node runtime using byte-equivalent module logic
boundaries: verified signature plus exact fresh claims accepted
rejected signature cannot be upgraded by matching claims
verified signature cannot bypass exact workflow identity
verified signature cannot bypass token freshness

source_status: repository modules and deterministic local execution
privacy_boundary: No tokens, credentials, private chat, health material, or identifying user data were read or committed.
uncertainty: The composite evaluator has not yet processed a live GitHub-issued OIDC token inside Actions and is not yet wired into the deployment workflow.
falsification_route: Wire the evaluator after pinned discovery/JWKS signature verification in the protected workflow; reject the run if either signature or claim authorization fails; inspect the uploaded decision artifact against the exact run identity.
trust_limit: This artifact does not prove Cloudflare deployment, replay rejection, evidence truth, diagnosis, treatment, or scientific truth.
